microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **security posture validation** program from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills driving **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, SAP, Walmart, and NetApp.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing program capacity by 21% — freeing engineers to focus on higher-priority security remediation work.

Improved **data integrity and retrieval** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by 83% across cross-functional engineering teams.
